nasb.text: At that time Jesus went through the grainfields on the Sabbath, and His disciples became hungry and began to pick the heads of grain and eat.

esv.text: At that time Jesus went through the grainfields on the Sabbath. His disciples were hungry, and they began to pluck heads of grain and to eat.

cnv.text: 安息日那天，耶穌從麥田經過；他的門徒餓了，就摘了些麥穗來吃。

ccb.text: 那时，耶稣在安息日经过一片麦田。祂的门徒饿了，便随手搓麦穗吃。

csbs.text: 在安息日那天，耶稣从麦田经过。他的门徒们饿了，就开始摘麦穗吃。
